stdout:
Table	Create Table
hofmarkt_bestellungen	CREATE TABLE `hofmarkt_bestellungen` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `hof_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `kunde_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `kunde_telefon` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `kunde_email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_strasse` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_plz` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_ort` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `produkte` json NOT NULL,
  `gesamtpreis` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `nachricht` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neu',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_hof_user_id` (`hof_user_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_kunde_telefon` (`kunde_telefon`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
